data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Reducing the number of choices to improve decision time for users.
data.technical_spec: Simplified user interfaces, minimalistic design principles.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizing button sizes and positions for efficient user interaction.
data.technical_spec: Responsive design, large tap targets on mobile interfaces.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design consistency across platforms to match user expectations.
data.technical_spec: Uniform design language, consistent iconography and navigation.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: A visually pleasing design improves user perception of functionality.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Grouping related items closely together to enhance readability and comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Grid layout systems, spatial grouping strategies.
